title: Site Reliability Engineer
score_reasoning: This SRE role mirrors the previous Anaplan posting in technical scope and location. Your observability expertise (OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Grafana), Python/Go scripting, AWS experience, Docker containerization, Terraform knowledge, and proven incident response and reliability improvements at Velox align well with the core SRE responsibilities of automation, production platform support, and troubleshooting. However, the same material gaps apply: Linux administration as a required day-one skill is not prominently evidenced, and production Kubernetes cluster administration—beyond microservices interaction—is not confirmed in your profile. The role's seniority level appears mid-range without explicit Senior designation, placing it below your current senior-level responsibilities. The location constraint remains the dominant blocker: Manchester hybrid role with no stated remote option creates a >2h timezone mismatch and on-site requirement that directly conflicts with your remote-first preference and Berlin-anchored location flexibility. Anaplan's brand strength does not override the location constraint given your explicit preferences.

red_flags: Hybrid role at Manchester; no remote option stated (conflicts with remote-first preference)
Location >2h timezone mismatch from Berlin; on-site hybrid required
Linux administration as day-one skill not prominently evidenced in CV
Production Kubernetes cluster administration required; limited confirmed ops experience
Role appears mid-level without explicit Senior title; scope below current Velox level
Event streaming technologies (Apache Pulsar, Flink) listed as desirable; no evidence
